rules.name: Optimized texture file should exist when tracked
rules.why: Missing optimized texture derivatives such as .tx files can increase render startup cost, texture IO, and farm memory pressure. When scanner metadata tracks an optimized derivative, the derivative should exist.

rules.name: Optimized texture derivative should be fresh
rules.message: Optimized texture derivative is stale compared with its source texture.
rules.why: Stale optimized derivatives can render older pixels than the source texture and make local lookdev diverge from farm rendering. Freshness should be reported when scanner metadata detects a stale optimized derivative.
